title: neillia monogyna
intro: Neillia monogyna, also known as Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Neillia monogyna include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, anxiety, and other conditions.
